## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss SEO content strategy and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Established approval process for new content topics and refreshes using Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Agreed to start publishing content sooner and iterate based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Discussed content refresh strategy and its potential impact on existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1151.0)
  - [Explored innovative brand voice development using fictional character personas](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)

## Topics

### Content Approval Workflow

  - [Created new Airtable view for "Ready to Review" articles](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Added approval flag and comment section for client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Agreed on 1-day SLA for content topic approvals](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)
  - [Will tag articles to specific pillars/topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### Content Production Strategy

  - [Shifting from perfecting content pre-publication to iterating post-publication](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Aiming to publish 10 new articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Implementing 5 content refreshes on top of new content](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Using SEO testing tool to measure impact of content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)

### Keyword Research and Topic Selection

  - [Conducted keyword gap analysis with 5-7 competitors](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Generated 380 potential topic assignments](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Will refine to 40-50 topics for client review](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Flexibility to adjust focus based on client priorities](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### Brand Voice Development

  - [Explored using fictional character personas to refine Ramp's brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
  - [Generated 10 character examples aligning with Ramp's tone](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Will experiment with adapting existing content to preferred character voices](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Considering incorporation of executive-level brand voice from video content](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)

### Content Organization and Canonicalization

  - [Ramp to share export of current articles assigned by topic](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2168.0)
  - [GrowthX to review for potential content overlap and canonicalization needs](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2180.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ramp to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2212.0)
      - [Search Console access](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [Paid search data access](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
      - [List of content pillars and their owners](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2220.0)
      - [Export of current articles by topic](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2200.0)
  - [GrowthX to:](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
      - [Prepare 40-50 topics for review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
      - [Begin content refreshes and measure impact](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [Experiment with brand voice adaptations](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
      - [Update meeting notes and share in relevant channels](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)
  - [Alley (Ramp) to review 3 calibration articles for style and tone feedback](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
  - [Clarify artwork/cover image process for new content](https://fathom.video/share/yorXVzh4Ke87Ax7AR_NX5cpfVNThiVEr?tab=summary&timestamp=2286.0)
